'''yakolo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:deadheartedness|deadheartedness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-k-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deadheartedness|deadheartedness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yakolo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yækeleth|yækeleth]] || [[word:yækelej|yækelej]] || [[word:yækelesh|yækelesh]] || [[word:yækele|yækele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yakokoloth|yakokoloth]] || [[word:yakokoloj|yakokoloj]] || [[word:yakokolosh|yakokolosh]] || [[word:yakokolo|yakokolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yakoloth|yakoloth]] || [[word:yakoloj|yakoloj]] || [[word:yakolosh|yakolosh]] || [[word:yakolo|yakolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yakofloth|yakofloth]] || [[word:yakofloj|yakofloj]] || [[word:yakoflosh|yakoflosh]] || [[word:yakoflof|yakoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yakolotho|yakolotho]] || [[word:yakolojo|yakolojo]] || [[word:yakolosho|yakolosho]] || [[word:yakoloko|yakoloko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yakoloth|yakoloth]] || [[word:yakoloj|yakoloj]] || [[word:yakolosh|yakolosh]] || [[word:yakolo|yakolo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yakolothol|yakolothol]] || [[word:yakolojol|yakolojol]] || [[word:yakoloshol|yakoloshol]] || [[word:yakolokol|yakolokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yakolothotho|yakolothotho]] || [[word:yakolojojo|yakolojojo]] || [[word:yakoloshosho|yakoloshosho]] || [[word:yakoloko|yakoloko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yakolothon|yakolothon]] || [[word:yakolojon|yakolojon]] || [[word:yakoloshon|yakoloshon]] || [[word:yakolokon|yakolokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yakolothoro|yakolothoro]] || [[word:yakolojoro|yakolojoro]] || [[word:yakoloshoro|yakoloshoro]] || [[word:yakolokoro|yakolokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
